response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and distributed-systems exposure, but the resume shows no executive leadership, no team-scaling track record, and only nascent agentic-AI work at current employer. The role demands a CTO with 5+ years senior technical leadership, production multi-agent AI systems, and fintech-infrastructure depth — none of which are demonstrated here.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, backend, and embedded systems with 15+ years experience
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role (re:cinq)
Distributed-systems experience at Sociomantic handling high-throughput, low-latency microservices
concerns: No evidence of executive/CTO-level leadership or scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers
No production multi-agent AI systems experience — only recent, light agentic tooling work
Minimal fintech-infrastructure depth; RIDE Capital tenure was IC-level, not architectural/regulatory

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems experience
Strong distributed-systems and polyglot engineering background
